title: erigeron gunnii var. bellidioides
intro: Erigeron gunnii var. bellidioides, also known as Alpine Fleabane, is a perennial plant in the daisy family, characterized by its small white or pinkish flowers and silvery-green foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Erigeron gunnii var. bellidioides include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for wound healing and skin conditions. Erigeron gunnii var. bellidioides is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including skin infections and digestive issues.
